title: Limitless HL Bot Maintainer Reference
content: This reference maps the trading system back to commit `d5e965d3d5ff5f929d5bbe6cc34839d5fa8123db`. It is for maintainers auditing how markets are discovered, scored, executed, exited, and learned from.

title: Target
content: Limitless HL Bot Maintainer Reference - Target

title: Architecture
content: Limitless HL Bot Maintainer Reference - Architecture

title: Market Discovery and Venue Clients
content: Discovery is read-only. It produces candidates and observations; order signing is delegated to the execution layer. Cached HTTP reads live in `cached_get_json`, which keeps network failures from silently becoming trading approval.

title: Public surfaces
content: Market Discovery and Venue Clients - Public surfaces

title: Data boundary
content: Market Discovery and Venue Clients - Data boundary

title: Scoring and Signals
content: Scores are evidence, not execution authority. The daemon applies strategy, price-band, cooldown, and learner gates before any candidate reaches an order builder.

title: Execution and Orders
content: The order layer keeps construction separate from submission so tests can prove payload shape without broadcasting. Live routing raises `LiveTradingBlocked` when the configured boundary does not authorize a live path.

title: Risk, Quotes, and Exits
content: Risk is layered: quote sizing, collateral accounting, live-performance gates, loss cooldowns, and an exit engine each have independent evidence and tests.

title: Operations and Learning
content: PM2 process declarations live in `ecosystem.config.cjs`. The default posture keeps the funding-live process disabled until the learner has positive live evidence.
